calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Vacated

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Continued To Apr-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff HSBC Mortgage Services, Inc. is present. Plaintiff did not have settlement authority present.
Attorney Michael D. Zeff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tommy Phan is present. Luong Ngoc is not present.
Attorney Melvin Ceasar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

Per agreement of the parties and court approval, the trial date of MAR-05-2012 is continued to 4-2-2012 @ 9:00AM in Dept. 501.
